payload.answer: Compiled the two provided PPO run metrics into memory cards without deriving additional claims.
payload.decision: Store two PPO run observations (Reward and Sharpe with notes) as independent factual memory cards.

memory_cards.statement: Run PPO-001 has Reward 0.12 and Sharpe 0.45; Notes: baseline.
Run PPO-002 has Reward 0.18 and Sharpe 0.51; Notes: entropy tuned.

details: Two memory cards created for PPO-001 and PPO-002 using exact numeric values from the table.

repair_options: If additional context exists (e.g., seeds, evaluation horizon, environment), add separate memory cards for those attributes without altering the recorded Reward/Sharpe values.
If the table is part of a larger experiment, include experiment/run grouping identifiers as additional entities (only if explicitly provided).
